content.en:
At the age of three million eternal years, Ye Tian was directly kicked out of the Wudao Tower, and he was not allowed to continue to participate in enlightenment.

"It's a pity, if only I could keep practicing enlightenment!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But it's impossible!

No matter what the resource is, even if it is a permanent resource, it is impossible for everyone to use, if all resources are free to use, and everyone comes to reach out and open their mouths, then who will provide resources for them?

If everyone doesn't work hard, one force will be abolished in the future.

Therefore, no force will allow this to happen, and if you want to get enough resources, you have to have this qualification.

And Ye Tian manages the human race, and the same is true.

After coming out of the void of the Daoless Tower's body, the Lord of Time reappeared.

"Ye Tian, how is the effect?"

The Lord of Time asked.

"I have mastered the power of the rudimentary form of the Extreme Dao!"

Ye Tian said.

"Are you sure about the power of the Extreme Dao Rudiment?"

The Lord of Time was shocked.

He thought that Ye Tian had only mastered the Extreme Dao Skin, but he didn't expect Ye Tian to actually master the power of the Extreme Dao Prototype, such a speed of comprehension was too fast!

At this moment, Ye Tian demonstrated the power of the Spatial Extreme Dao Prototype, the power of the Time Extreme Dao Prototype, and the power of the Void Extreme Dao Prototype.

The power of the three extreme path rudiments diffused, and the pupils of the Lord of Time shrank.

"The power of the three extreme path rudiments!"

The Lord of Time was shocked again.

Ye Tian chose to expose the power of these three extreme path prototypes, and he also had his own plans.

First of all, there is no need to hide his strength, with the strength of the Lord of Time, it is completely unnecessary for him to hide it, and if the Lord of Time really wants to spy on his body, he can't hide it.

Rather than that, it is better to expose it directly.

And if he exposes his talent, he will inevitably be more valued by the Wudao Tower in the future, and maybe in the future, similar opportunities will fall on his head.

The opportunity to pick up in vain, don't want it in vain.

"Not bad!"

The Lord of Time approving.

Of course, the Lord of Time didn't say much, but he had a higher opinion of Ye Tian in his heart.

For Ye Tian, this is enough!

In the following years, Ye Tian focused on comprehending the power of the Extreme Dao of the Sword, as for the Extreme Dao of Space, the Extreme Dao of Time, and the Extreme Dao of Nothingness, without the assistance of the super-perfect treasure, the effect of comprehension was almost stagnant.

As a result, he gave up meditation for the time being.

The years are like traces, passing quickly.

Before you know it, millions of eternal years have passed.

And after such a long time, Ye Tian's Sword Extreme Dao Prototype has made great progress.

At this moment, he has fused the changes of the sword path to less than 10,000 kinds, and the prototype of the sword extreme path at this time is considered to be a Dacheng realm, and he is very close to mastering the true sword extreme dao.

However, after merging to less than 10,000 variations, it is much more difficult to continue to fuse.

And relying on the power of the Great Cheng-level Sword Extreme Dao Prototype, Ye Tian had already approached the vicinity of that super-perfect treasure, and the endless Sword Extreme Dao power was difficult to hurt him.

"If you can enter the inner void of this sword, the effect of enlightenment will be even better!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He felt that his current self should be able to enter the inner void of this sword, but he might not be able to hold on for long.

"It doesn't matter if I can't last long, when I entered this ninth layer void, I couldn't last long, and it wasn't because I relied on countless copies of my body to finally comprehend the fur of the Sword Extreme Dao, so I could stay here forever!"

Therefore, Ye Tian finally continued to do so.

Airplanes!

The power of the rudimentary form of the Sword Extreme Dao wrapped the power of Ye Tian to forcibly tear apart the Extreme Dao of the Sword, and stepped into the inner void of this sword.

Since this sword had not yet been completely conceived, the power of the inner void was extremely violent.

In an instant, Ye Tian was torn apart by the power of the Sword Extreme Dao, but at least he could still hold on.

And here, Ye Tian sensed the most fundamental power of the Sword Extreme Dao.

"This is the true Extreme Way of the Sword!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

But soon, his replica body shattered!

But it doesn't matter, he has already copied another replica body, this replica body has collapsed, it doesn't affect anything, just spend some resources to condense another replica body.

In this way, in the following years, Ye Tian entered the inner void of this sword again and again, comprehended the true origin of the sword extreme path, and his understanding of the sword extreme path reached an incredible level, and the speed of progress was extremely fast.

It didn't take too long for Ye Tian to fuse the changes of the sword path to the level of five thousand.

Fusion of 4,000 species!

Fusion of 3,000 species!

Fusion of 2,000 species!

Fusion of a thousand!

......

About five million eternal years had passed, and Ye Tian had fused the sword path to the point where there were only ninety-nine changes left.

At this time, the rudimentary form of the Extreme Dao of the Sword had almost reached the extreme, and its strength had reached an incomparably terrifying level.

And Ye Tian can also stay in the inner void of this sword all the time, and he will not be torn apart by the power of the sword's extreme path.

"It is really difficult to comprehend the power of the Extreme Dao, if I accidentally discovered this super-perfect treasure that is being conceived, and I have the ability to copy the talent, I will not be able to comprehend the power of the rudimentary form of the Extreme Dao of the Sword so quickly!"

Ye Tian muttered.

His strength is much stronger now than it was at the beginning, and if he exerts the power of the Extreme Dao Prototype of the Sword with all his might, a single sword will be enough to kill the Nameless Kun in an instant.

In other words, the weaker medium perfect master will not be able to withstand the power of his sword.

With his current strength, he is not invincible among the medium perfect masters, but it is almost there.

However, even so, it would still take him a long time to comprehend the true Extreme Dao of the Sword, after all, it would be too difficult to master a true Extreme Dao power.

this day.

Ye Tian ushered in another breakthrough, that is, he broke the eighth pole-making chain, and almost all of them were the power of the Extreme Dao Prototype of the Sword, if he didn't have the ultimate Extreme Dao Prototype Power of the Sword, he wouldn't be able to break the eighth Pole-making chain, after all, he barely used much Extreme Formation Material this time!

After the eighth pole-making chain was broken, Ye Tian's strength increased by a small margin, which was not a big amount, but it was also an improvement.

"Continue to work hard to cultivate, and strive to master the Sword Extreme Dao thoroughly before you become the perfect master!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After another period of time, the top management of the Daoless Tower informed Ye Tian that the No. 3 Tower Master of the Daoless Tower had left the customs and was about to start a sermon, and in addition to those who were perfectly in control, the half-step perfect master of the Extreme Realm was also qualified to listen to this tower master's sermon.

"It's this one out of the customs!"

Ye Tian was shocked, this is a great thing, he must listen to this person's sermon.
